sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90272" key="prosupokli/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσυπο-κλίνω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <sense id="n90272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place underneath</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῖς μηροῖς τὰ γόνατα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.76</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
